Vocational School of Health Services

Programs

Health Institutions Management

MENU

The aim of the program is to train qualified staff with knowledge of business and hospital management in the health sector.  The Health Institutions Management Program prepares management trainees for the needs of health care institutions in both theory and practical applications.

In the last decade in Turkey, the number of hospitals has rapidly increased and hospitals are struggling to be able to give high quality service. According to the demand from the Health Sector, students graduating from the Health Institutions Management program will find work in all departments besides direct patient applications. Education will be carried out with expert academic staff consisting of the industry’s leading trainers.

The program language is Turkish. Students who wish can take the one year English Preparatory Class. During the internship, students work in hospitals, other health institutions and graduates are employed in this field.

Period of Education

2 years

Prep School:

Optional

Hospital Practice:

Yes

Hospital Internship:

Yes

Education Language:

Turkish
